parameters.query:
SELECT dc.*, u.name AS doctor_name, u.email AS doctor_email
FROM doctor_contracts dc
LEFT JOIN users u ON dc.doctor_id = u.id
WHERE ($1::integer IS NULL OR dc.clinic_id = $1::integer)
  AND ($2::boolean IS NULL OR dc.is_active = $2::boolean)
ORDER BY u.name, dc.valid_from DESC

SELECT dc.*, u.name AS doctor_name
FROM doctor_contracts dc
LEFT JOIN users u ON dc.doctor_id = u.id
WHERE dc.doctor_id = $1::uuid
ORDER BY dc.valid_from DESC

parameters.jsCode:
const b = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;
return [{ json: {
  id:                   b.id || '',
  doctor_id:            b.doctor_id || '',
  clinic_id:            b.clinic_id ? String(b.clinic_id) : '',
  contract_type:        b.contract_type || 'honorarios',
  calculation_type:     b.calculation_type || 'porcentaje',
  base_salary:          b.base_salary != null ? String(b.base_salary) : '',
  hourly_rate:          b.hourly_rate != null ? String(b.hourly_rate) : '',
  percentage_rate:      b.percentage_rate != null ? String(b.percentage_rate) : '',
  percentage_threshold: b.percentage_threshold != null ? String(b.percentage_threshold) : '',
  percentage_basis:     b.percentage_basis || '',
  per_session_rate:     b.per_session_rate != null ? String(b.per_session_rate) : '',
  currency:             b.currency || 'UYU',
  valid_from:           b.valid_from || '',
  valid_until:          b.valid_until || '',
  is_active:            b.is_active !== false,
  notes:                b.notes || '',
  created_by:           b.created_by || ''
} }];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO doctor_contracts
  (id, doctor_id, clinic_id, contract_type, calculation_type,
   base_salary, hourly_rate, percentage_rate, percentage_threshold, percentage_basis,
   per_session_rate, currency, valid_from, valid_until, is_active, notes, created_by)
VALUES
  (COALESCE(NULLIF($1,'')::uuid, gen_random_uuid()),
   $2::uuid,
   NULLIF($3,'')::integer,
   $4::contract_type_enum,
   $5::calculation_type_enum,
   NULLIF($6,'')::decimal,
   NULLIF($7,'')::decimal,
   NULLIF($8,'')::decimal,
   NULLIF($9,'')::decimal,
   NULLIF($10,'')::percentage_basis_enum,
   NULLIF($11,'')::decimal,
   COALESCE(NULLIF($12,''), 'UYU')::currency_enum,
   $13::date,
   NULLIF($14,'')::date,
   $15::boolean,
   NULLIF($16,''),
   NULLIF($17,'')::uuid)
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  contract_type        = EXCLUDED.contract_type,
  calculation_type     = EXCLUDED.calculation_type,
  base_salary          = EXCLUDED.base_salary,
  hourly_rate          = EXCLUDED.hourly_rate,
  percentage_rate      = EXCLUDED.percentage_rate,
  percentage_threshold = EXCLUDED.percentage_threshold,
  percentage_basis     = EXCLUDED.percentage_basis,
  per_session_rate     = EXCLUDED.per_session_rate,
  currency             = EXCLUDED.currency,
  valid_from           = EXCLUDED.valid_from,
  valid_until          = EXCLUDED.valid_until,
  is_active            = EXCLUDED.is_active,
  notes                = EXCLUDED.notes
RETURNING id, doctor_id, contract_type, is_active
UPDATE doctor_contracts SET is_active = false, valid_until = COALESCE(valid_until, CURRENT_DATE) WHERE id = $1::uuid RETURNING id
